svg.title: CloudPulse architecture diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing user browser connecting to Render cloud which runs Flask app connected to MongoDB Atlas, with GitHub providing CI/CD auto-deploy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with CloudPulse?')
sendPrompt('What does Gunicorn do in CloudPulse?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the Flask app have?')
sendPrompt('How does request logging work in CloudPulse?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the users collection?')
sendPrompt('What does the request_logs collection store?')
sendPrompt('What does the metrics collection track?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub auto-deploy work with Railway?')
